endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/checkNamespaceAvailability
endpoints.description: Checks the availability of the given service namespace across all Azure subscriptions. This is useful because the domain name is created based on the service namespace name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces
endpoints.description: Lists all the available namespaces within the subscription irrespective of the resourceGroups.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces
endpoints.description: Lists the available namespaces within a resourceGroup.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Returns the description for the specified namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Creates/Updates a service namespace. Once created, this namespace's resource manifest is immutable. This operation is idempotent.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing namespace. This operation also removes all associated notificationHubs under the namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Patches the existing namespace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}/AuthorizationRules
endpoints.description: Gets the authorization rules for a namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}/AuthorizationRules/{authorizationRuleName}
endpoints.description: Gets an authorization rule for a namespace by name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONRULENAME}} with a real authorizationrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}/AuthorizationRules/{authorizationRuleName}

Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONRULENAME}} with a real authorizationrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.description: Deletes a namespace authorization rule

Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONRULENAME}} with a real authorizationrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}/AuthorizationRules/{authorizationRuleName}/listKeys
endpoints.description: Gets the Primary and Secondary ConnectionStrings to the namespace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTHORIZATIONRULENAME}} with a real authorizationrulename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}/AuthorizationRules/{authorizationRuleName}/regenerateKeys
